signals.headline: Ethereum ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High (Strongest Since January), Driving 7% Price Surge to ~$2,400 Amid Institution
signals.raw:
Ethereum ETF Inflows Hit $275M Weekly High (Strongest Since January), Driving 7% Price Surge to ~$2,400 Amid Institutional Demand** | YES | HIGH  
Ethereum spot ETFs recorded over $275 million in inflows for the week—the highest since January 2026—with Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA leading, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to nearly $2,400 as total crypto market cap rose to $2.6 trilli
